videoSnippet.title: Viswanathan Anand (+Kasparov) vs Magnus Carlsen || FIDE World Blitz Team Championships 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Anand, Viswanathan (2704) - Carlsen, Magnus (2869)
FIDE World Rapid & Blitz Team Chess Championships 2026 (Chess.com) [03] 2026.06.20
B49 Sicilian, Taimanov variation

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 e6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nc6 5.Nc3 Qc7 6.Be3 a6 7.Be2 Nf6 8.O-O Be7 9.f4 d6 10.Kh1 O-O 11.Qe1 Bd7 12.Qg3 b5 13.a3 Rab8 14.e5 dxe5 15.fxe5 Nxe5 16.Rxf6 Bxf6 17.Bf4 Bc6 18.Nxc6 Qxc6 19.Bxe5 Bxe5 20.Qxe5 Rfd8 21.Bd3 Qd6 22.Qxd6 Rxd6 23.Ne4 Rc6 24.b4 Rd8 25.Nc5 Rd4 26.Kg1 f5 27.Bf1 Rcd6 28.c3 Rd2 29.a4 Rc2 30.axb5 axb5 31.Bxb5 Rxc3 32.Bf1 Kf7 33.Na4 Rb3 34.b5 Kf6 35.Nc5 Rb2 36.Na4 Rb4 37.Nc5 Rd5 38.Nd3 Rb3 39.Nf4 Rd4 40.g3 g5 41.Ne2 Rd2 42.Rc1 Rxb5 43.Nc3 Rbb2 44.Nd1 Rbc2 45.Rxc2 Rxc2 46.Ne3 Ra2 47.Nc4 e5 48.h3 e4
